urdu transliteration text:
HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN
HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN YA HUSSAIN
HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN
HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN, OH HUSSAIN

ZAHRA KA LAADLA BE JURM O BEKHAATA
HAAYE MAAR AAGAYA, HAAYE MAAR AAGAYA
GHURBAT KI, YAI SHAB HAI, BE PARDA, ZAINAB HAI, KARTI HAI, RO RO KAY, ZAINAB YAHI FUGHAA
english translation text: THE BELOVED SON OF ZAHRA WHO WAS INNOCEN AND FAULTLESS WAS KILLED ON THE PLAINS OF KARBALA. THIS NIGHT IS SORROFULL AS ZAINAB WITHOUT HER HIJAB CRIES AND CALLS OUT YA HUSSAIN.

urdu transliteration text:
WO JO LAHU LAHU HAI, KHALIQ KAI AABROO HAIN
AI SHAH-E-KARBALA MEHSHAR, TALAQ KHUDA
MAMNOON HAI TERA, MAMNOON HAI TERA
TU HAQ KA, RAHBAR HAI, NABIYON SAI, BAR KAR HAI, TERE HI, SADQE MAI, BAAKI HAI YAI JAHAA
english translation text: HUSSAIN THE ONE WHO HAS SHED HIS BLOOD WAS THE BEST OF CREATIONS, OH KING OF KARBALA TILL THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT GOD IS GRATEFULL TO YOU. YOU ARE THE LEADER OF PRINCIPLE, YOU ARE GREATER THAN THE PROPHETS. THIS WORLD CONTINUES TO EXIST FOR YOUR SAKE YA HUSSAIN.

urdu transliteration text:
ZAINAB KO BAS YAI GHAM HAI, ISS BAAT KA ALAM HAI
BAR KHAAK-E-NAINAWAA ZAHRA, KE LAAL KA
LAASHA PARA RAHAA, LAASHA PARA RAHAA
ZAINAB KO, YAAD AAAYI, BHAYYA KI, TANHAYI, JAB RAN SE, JAATA TA, PYAASO KA KARAVAN
english translation text: ZAINAB IS SADDENED BY THE PAIN THAT THE DEAD BODY OF THE BELOVED SON OF ZAHRA WAS LEFT ON THE BARE GROUND OF NAINAWA (LAND WHERE BATTLE TOOK PLACE). BIBI ZAINAB COULD ONLY REMEMBER THE LONLINESS OF HER BORTHER WHIST SHE PASSED THE BATTLE GROUND.

urdu transliteration text:
SEHMI HUWI SAKINA, PYAASI HAI WO HAZEENA
DETI RAHI SADAA GOHAR, MERE CHINE
DAAMAN BI JALGAYAA, DAAMAN BI JALGAYAA
SOONA YAI, SEHRA HAI, AI BABA, JANGAL MAI, YAI DUKHIYA, MAQTAL MAI, LAASHO KAI DARMIYAAN
english translation text: SAKINA WHO WAS FEARFUL WHILST THIRSTY CRIED OUT THAT HER EARINGS WERE STOLEN FROM HER AND THAT HER CLOTHES WERE BURNT. SHE CRIES OUT, ‘IT IS DESERTED, I AM LONELY, OH FATHER WHERE SHOULD I FINS YOU.’

urdu transliteration text:
BABA KO RONAY WAALI, SEENAY PE SONAY WAALI
AB SAARI ZINDAGI BABA, KO ROWAGI
KAISE WO SOWUNGI, KAISE WO SOWUNGI
GHABRA KAR, KHAIMO SE, NIKLE GI, PYAASI WO, DHOONDE GI, BABA KO, LAASHO KAI DARMIYAAN
english translation text: BIBI SAKINA, THE ONE WHO CRIED FOR HER FATHER AND USED TO SLEEP IN HIS ARMS, WONDERS WHERE SHE WILL SLEEP AT NIGHT. SHE WILL RUN OUT OF THE TENTS SCARED AND THIRSTY LOOKING FOR HER FATHER BETWEEN THE DEAD BODIES.

urdu transliteration text:
BAAD-E-HUSSAIN ZAINAB, SHABBIR BANGAYI HAI
JAB KHAIMA JAL GAAYE LAASHE, PAI BHAAYI KAI
HAMSHEER NE KAHAA, HAMSHEER NE KAHAA
MAQTAL MAIN, YAI TUJSE, WAADA HAI, ZAINAB KA, YAI TER, QURBANI, HOGI NA RAAEGA
english translation text: AFTER THE MARTYDOM OF IMAM HUSSAIN, BIBI ZAINAB HAS BECOME THE LEADER. WHEN THE TENTS WHERE BURNT, BIBI ZAINAB CRIED OUT, ‘IT IS MY PROMISE THAT YOUR SACRIFICE WILL NEVER GO IN VEIN,’

urdu transliteration text:
BAS AI MOHIB YAI MATAM, ZAINAB KI AARZOO HAI
JO APNE BHAYYI KO, RAN MAI NA RO SAKI
AI BINTE MUSTAPHA, AI BINTE MUSTAPHA
QASIM KA, AKBAR KA, ZEHRA KAY, DIL BAR KA, DETAY HAI, SAB PURSAA, YA TERE NOHAKHAAN
english translation text: OH MOHIB (the poet) THIS AZADAARI IS THE WISH OF BIBI ZAINAB WHO COULDN’T CRY OVER HER BROTHER IN KARBALA. OH DAUGHTER OF MUSTAFA, YOUR AZADAAR RECITERS GIVE YOU THE CONDOLONCES OF QASIM, AKBER AND THE BELOVED SON OF BIBI FATEMAH ZEHRA
